title: コッコさんTIMESTOP
description:
Stop time and save the eggs!!"Cocco-san TIMESTOP" is a retro action game where you stop time to break through enemies and obstacles and reach the goal.
Cocco-san has no way to attack. The only weapon is the power to stop time.
Charging enemies and vanishing platforms are no match for you inside frozen time. Simple to play, yet impossible to put down.⏱ Your only weapon: Time Stop
At the press of a button, the world freezes.
Rushing enemies and moving traps hold no fear inside stopped time.
When to stop the clock — that split-second call decides everything.🏃 Dash through with jumps
Cocco-san has just two actions: jump and time stop.
Obstacles include invisible platforms and platforms that vanish over time.
Stop time to open a path and press forward.💢 Don't crash into them
Enemies keep coming, and Cocco-san can't fight back — only dodge.
Leap over them or freeze time to slip past: cool judgment is the key to survival.🥚 Rescue the goal egg
The goal of every stage is a shining egg.
Race through frozen time and reach the egg safe and sound!🔥 Looks easy… but it's tough!?Four modes: Easy / Normal / Hard / ???. Every stage is independently designed, so you can replay endlessly.
• EASY — Learn the controls! Every mistake sticks a fried egg on your screen and blocks your view!?

• NORMAL — The standard difficulty. Nail the timing of your time stop!

• HARD — Punishing stages that demand precise timing and jumps.

• ??? — A super-hard mode only the chosen few may challenge!!
✅ Perfect for players who…• love pick-up-and-play retro action with depth

• want satisfying, chewy difficulty with simple controls

• enjoy timing-mastery games

• want to show off their skills in streams and videos
🎬 Streaming & monetization — all OK!Let's plays, clips, monetization — all welcome!
Share your "time-stop moments" with everyone alongside Cocco-san.
• 🎬 Game streaming & videos — OK!

• 💰 Ad revenue & donations — OK!

• ✂️ Clips & short videos — OK!
* Malicious use such as modding the game or distributing ROMs is not permitted.📦 Product InfoTitleCocco-san TIMESTOPGenreRetro ActionPlayers1 PlayerLanguagesJapanese / English / Simplified Chinese / Traditional Chinese / Korean / French / Spanish / GermanPublisherONE CONNECT GAMES (One Connect Inc.)
description_short: Stop time and save the eggs. Your only weapon is the power to STOP TIME. Charging enemies, vanishing platforms — nothing can touch you in frozen time. Simple controls, brutally tough: a retro action game you won't be able to put down!
